blended.narrative: Big Sky is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,127 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 52".
